name: Zucchini and Tomato Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the zucchini, onion, and garlic thinly.
2. Place all ingredients in a large saucepan.
3. Cut the tomatoes into bite-sized chunks and add them to the saucepan along with the rosemary and crushed red pepper.
4. Heat the mixture for 15-30 minutes, allowing the flavors to meld together.
5. Serve over pasta. Enjoy!
